extract: Quilava (Japanese: マグマラシ Magmarashi) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Cyndaquil starting at level 14 and evolves into Typhlosion starting at level 36. In Hisui, it evolves from Cyndaquil starting at level 17 and evolves into Hisuian Typhlosion starting at level 36.
